name: FlashAttention (IO-aware attention)
author: OpenTikZ contributors
description: FlashAttention, three-panel homage after Dao et al., 2022. Left: the GPU memory hierarchy as a banded triangle (SRAM 19 TB/s / HBM 1.5 TB/s / DRAM 12.8 GB/s) showing the bandwidth-vs-size trade-off. Center: the IO-aware dataflow — Q, K^T and V tiles streamed from HBM, copied block-by-block into SRAM (outer loop over K/V, inner loop over Q), where the QK^T block and softmax are fused before sm(QK^T)V is written back to HBM. Right: the GPT-2 attention runtime, a stacked PyTorch bar (Matmul/Mask/Softmax/Dropout/Matmul) versus FlashAttention's single fused kernel.
